page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g9a.large is a general-purpose virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 2 dedicated vCPUs mapped to 2 physical cores of an AMD EPYC 9T25 processor running at a base clock speed of 2.7 GHz on the x86_64 architecture. The instance is configured with 8.0 GB of system memory, providing a balanced allocation of 4.0 GB of RAM per physical core.

This instance does not include bundled local storage, requiring external block storage volumes for operating system and application data. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 2 Gbps. The dedicated CPU allocation ensures consistent processing performance without the resource contention typical of shared-core or burstable instances, though the lack of integrated local storage and hardware acceleration limits its use in high-throughput database or GPU-intensive workloads.

Given its balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio, the ecs.g9a.large is structured for general-purpose workloads. It offers qualitative cost efficiency for entry-level production environments, microservices, lightweight web servers, and development or testing environments that require predictable CPU performance without the overhead of larger instance classes.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g9a.large is a general-purpose instance featuring 2 dedicated vCPUs powered by an AMD EPYC 9T25 processor running at 2.7 GHz on the x86_64 architecture. It is equipped with 8.0 GB of RAM, establishing a balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio. Operating on the KVM hypervisor, this instance does not include local storage, relying instead on network-attached storage, and provides a baseline network bandwidth of 2 Gbps. With dedicated CPU cores and no hyperthreading, it delivers stable, predictable performance for workloads that do not require GPU acceleration or high local disk I/O. The instance is qualitatively cost-efficient for running lightweight web servers, microservices, containerized applications, and development environments.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g9a.large is a general-purpose instance featuring 2 dedicated AMD EPYC vCPUs, 8.0 GB of RAM, and 2 Gbps network bandwidth, optimized for predictable performance in lightweight workloads.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g9a.large is a general-purpose instance with 2 dedicated AMD EPYC vCPUs, 8.0 GB of RAM, and KVM-based virtualization.
tagline: A dedicated dual-core AMD EPYC virtual machine offering balanced memory and compute resources for predictable general-purpose workloads.
bullet_points: Two dedicated AMD EPYC 9T25 CPU cores running at 2.7 GHz
8.0 GB of system memory providing a balanced 1:4 resource ratio
Baseline network bandwidth of 2 Gbps via KVM virtualization
No bundled local storage, requiring external block storage
Best suited for microservices, web serving, and development environments
